ksa_text: Skill in managing data asset catalogs and discovery mechanisms, including metadata tagging, data lineage documentation, access method documentation, and search capability optimization for organizational data consumers.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: skill from Operations & Program Management (affinity 0.60); strategic/implementation framing outweighs governance signals. STRM composite is minimal (0.0000 — likely framework vocabulary mismatch). A Chief Data and Information Officer would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 2 match(es) in governance job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Chief Data and Information Officer whose mandate centers on policy, oversight, and governance.
